live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

effective_at.description: The timestamp until when the quoted rate is valid.

expires_at.description: The timestamp until which the quote must be booked by.

foreign_exchange_indicator.description: Either `fixed_to_variable` if the `base_amount` was specified, or `variable_to_fixed` if the `target_amount` was specified when requesting the quote.

foreign_exchange_rate.description: The serialized rate information represented by this quote.

internal_account_id.description: The ID for the `InternalAccount` this quote is associated with.

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.

vendor_id.description: This vendor assigned ID for this quote.
